instructions: All questions are from actual AFCAT previous years

questions.question_text: Pick the option that gives the correct order: P. Amongst all the cities of Japan, Hiroshima is the one that experiences earliest mornings. Q. It experiences the earliest sun rise amongst all the countries. R. According to the words of the Japanese envoy himself, that name was chosen because the country was so close to where the sun rises. S. Japan is also known as the land of the rising sun.

Rearrange the parts of the sentence in correct order. P. despite pandemic-related travel complications, the Q. governments of India and France facilitated interactions R. NPCIL a binding techno-commercial offer on 22 April 2021 S. between EDF and NPCIL which allowed EDF to submit to

Rearrange the parts of the sentence in correct order. P. actually move so slowly that algae grows on their fur and Q. the forest from predators like nocturnal cats and harpy eagles R. this can give sloths a green colour that helps them hide in S. sloths live in tropical forests in South and Central America, and they

Rearrange the parts of the sentence in correct order. It is not uncommon P. for parents and others in a particular animal Q. group to teach their young through example how to R. of drought or other environmental change S. find food or water when it becomes scarce because

In each of the following questions, a sentence has been broken into parts... Choose the correct order... I. in a masterly way II. Munshi Premchand's works, especially fiction, III. have been analysed and critiqued IV. in the next chapter
Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 5: (Context: Animal behavior and predictions of natural calamities)
Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 4: (Context: Animal behavior and predictions of natural calamities)
Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 3: (Context: Animal behavior and predictions of natural calamities)
Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 2: (Context: Animal behavior and predictions of natural calamities)
The most appropriate title for the above passage would be : (Context: Change of nature when suddenly confronted with terrible danger)
The author names three different ways in which a man may react to sudden danger. What are they?

choices.text: He may flee in panic, or fight back or stand still.
He may be paralysed with fear; seized with panic or act like an inferior animal.
He may be paralysed with fear, or seized with panic, or as if by miracle, become possessed of the necessary courage, and face the danger.
He may be paralysed with fear, run away or fight.

questions.question_text: The distinction between 'inferior animals' and 'rational beings' is that :

choices.text: The former are incapable of fighting.
The latter are capable of reasoning things out whereas the former cannot do so.

questions.question_text: Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error: My brother-in-laws / have been staying / with us this past week / and they are driving me crazy.

choices.text: and they are driving me crazy

questions.question_text: Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error: If / it will rain, / we will have / a tough time.
Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error: By the time / I reached / the theatre, / the movie begun.

Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank and complete the expression. I begin to pronounce the sequence of words and numbers that will prevent her from giving him a piece of her _________.
Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. Carry the day
Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. Kick the bucket
Select the most appropriate synonym for the given word: NULLIFY
Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word: Congenial
Choose the word nearest in meaning to the underlined word in the following sentence: He spoke impromptu on the occasion.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word: RECKLESS
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word: Pacify
The word opposite in meaning to 'Eminent' is
In the following question, out of the four alternatives, select the alternative which is the best substitute of the phrase: A critical judge of any art and craft
Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words: The study of skin
Select the pair that best expresses the relationship similar to that expressed in the pair given below: Doctor: Hospital
Select the pair that best expresses the relationship similar to that expressed in the pair given below: Human: Mammals
The new policy will be __________ next month.
Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. People were quite prepared that day ___ the demolition of the Supertech Twin Towers in NOIDA.
Who is hosting Exercise Desert Flag-10, which involves the participation of the Indian Air Force and several other countries' air forces?

Consider the following statements regarding the Rafale-M fighter jets: 1. The Rafale-M is a sixth-generation fighter aircraft designed for carrier-based operations. 2. The Rafale-M jets are capable of carrying out anti-ship missions but cannot deliver nuclear payloads. Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
Which two European ships are visiting Mumbai under EUNAVFOR? (June 2025)

choices.text: HMS Queen Elizabeth & FS Charles de Gaulle
ESPS Reina Sofia & ITS Antonio Marceglia

questions.question_text: Which exercise did the Indian Air Force conducted involving Rafale jets and complex ground attack missions in April 2025?
What name has been given to the tiger corridor area connecting the Kawal Tiger Reserve in Telangana with the Tadoba-Andhari Tiger Reserve in Maharashtra?

Consider the following statements regarding Balukhand-Konark Wildlife Sanctuary: 1. It is located in the state of Andhra Pradesh. 2. Olive Ridley sea turtles have been observed nesting along the coastal areas of this sanctuary. Which of the statements given above is/are correct?

Consider the following statements regarding the Himalayan Yak: 1. The Himalayan Yak is endemic to the Tibetan Plateau and the adjacent high-altitude regions of India. 2. The Wild Yak is listed as Critically Endangered under the IUCN Red List. Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
Which Indian state plans to establish its first tiger safari in the Barwadih Western Forest Range, aimed at housing rescued and orphaned tigers to boost tourism and conservation?
Who was the first person to conduct a systematic study of chromosomes during division and called this process mitosis?
Write the names of the pores present in the leaves through which exchange of gases takes place during respiration.

Consider the following information: 1 Chandrayaan-3 - GSLV - First successful soft landing on the Moon's south pole, 2 NVS-02 Mission - LVM3 M4 - 100th launch from Sriharikota (2024), 3 Aditya-L1 - PSLV-C57 - India's first solar mission, 4 Cartosat-2 series (2017) - PSLV-C37 - Launched a record 104 satellites in a single flight. In which of the above rows the given information is correctly matched?

Consider the following statements : (A) International Day are designated by the UN General Assembly . (B) Proposal for designation of International Day can be made only by the permanent members of the UN Security Council . Choose the correct answer from the codes given below :
Which of the following countries is a member of OPEC (Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries)?

choices.text: The Democratic Republic of the Congo

questions.question_text: How many teams will compete in the Men's and Women's cricket tournaments at LA 2028?
In which Indian state did the game of polo originated?
To whom did President Droupadi Murmu confer the 58th Jnanpith Award?
Who won the Miss World 2025 title?
Which of the following statements regarding the Comptroller Auditor General is INCORRECT?

choices.text: He certifies the net proceeds of any tax or duty, which is final.
He conducts audits of expenditure on behalf of the parliament.
His legal and regulatory audits are discretionary, but his propriety audit is obligatory.
Secret services expenditure is outside the purview of CAG.

questions.question_text: Who was recently appointed as a part-time member of the 16th Finance Commission, after Ajay Narayan Jha resignation?
Zaid crops are typically sown after the harvest of __________.
Arrange the following events in correct chronological order: 1. Cripps Mission, 2. Mountbatten's Plan, 3. Royal Indian Navy Mutiny
Which of the following plantations are found in the tropical regions of the world? (A) Rubber in Malaysia (B) Coffee in Brazil (C) Tea in India (D) Maize in Canada
Which of the following is a Legal Tender in India?

choices.text: Coins issued by the Government of India
Cheques issued by a recognised company

questions.question_text: Match the following with the help of code: a. Harshvardhan b. Pravarraj I c. Vilastung d. Bhimsen ... 1. Rajarshitulyukul 2. Nala Dynasty 3. Sharabhapuriya 4. Pandu Dynasty
The first Bhakti Movement was organised by ____________________.
A retail fruit vendor buys a score of apples for ₹400 and retails them for ₹264 at a dozen. What was his loss/gain per cent? (a score = 20 no's)
A watch dealer sells watches at Rs.212568 per watch. However, he is forced to give two successive discounts of 15% and 20% respectively. What is the marked price? (In Rs.)

A milk vendor purchases pure milk at Rs. 10 per litre. The dishonest vendor mixes the 250ml of water for every one litre of pure milk. Find the percentage gain if he sells the mixture at Rs. 12 per litre.
In a Lewis showroom, an offer is running "Buy 9 shirts get 3 shirts free". How much percent discount is there?
A is 50% more efficient than B. Working together, they can complete a job in 20 days. How long would B alone take to complete the same job?

Two taps A and B can fill a tank alone in 6 hours and 9 hours respectively while a third tap C alone can empty the same tank in 18 hours. If all the three taps are opened together, then in how many hours the tank will be filled?

Ajay and Vijay can do a work in 25 days and 40 days respectively. They start the work together, but Ajay left after some days and Vijay finished the remaining work in 27 days. After how many days did Ajay leave?
A candidate was asked to multiply a number by 25. He mistakenly multiplied it by 52. His answer was 324 more than the expected answer. So which number was the candidate asked to multiply?
Which of the following fractions is the largest? 11/12, 12/13, 13/14, 14/15
If x : y = 12 : 5 and z : y = 21 : 16, then find the value of x : z.
The ratio of the ages of the father and son is 7 : 3. If we multiply his age by the answer, we get 756. What will be the ratio of the ages of the father and the son after 6 years?

Aman, Binni, Chitra and Dinesh are four friends. Average age of Aman and Chitra is 35 yr and that of Binni and Dinesh is 40 yr. Average age of Binni, Chitra and Dinesh is 40 yr. The sum of the ages of Aman and Dinesh is equal to that of Binni and Chitra. Find out the ages (in yr) of Aman, Binni, Chitra and Dinesh.

In a class of 45 students, the ratio of the number of boys and girls is 4: 5. The average score of boys in mathematics is 78. If the average score of all the students in the class in mathematics is 76, then what is the average score of girls in mathematics?

In an alloy proportion of Zinc, Copper and Lead is 2 : 3 : 1. In another alloy the proportion of Zinc, Copper and Lead is 5 : 4 : 3. A third alloy is prepared by mixing both alloys in same quantity. The proportion of Lead, Copper and Zinc in the third alloy will be.
A number is increased by 30% and then decreased by 30%. Finally, the number:
A cuboidal water tank contains 256 litres of water. Its depth is half of its length and its breadth is 1/4 of the difference between its length and depth. The length of the tank is ___________.
If the difference between the compound interest and the simple interest on sum of money for 1 year compounded half - yearly at the rate of 8% per annum is Rs. 30, then find the sum.
A person invested a total of Rs. 57,500 at 4%, 5% and 8% per annum simple interest. At the end of the year, he received equal interest in all the three cases. The amount invested at 5% was:
A car can finish a certain journey in 10 hrs at a speed of 48 km/hr. In order to cover the same distance in 8 hrs, the speed of the car must be increased by:

Seven people - P, Q, R, S, T, U and V are sitting in a same row at equal distances facing towards north. Neither U nor V is sitting at any of the extreme ends. Q is sitting fourth to the left of T. Neither Q nor T is an immediate neighbour of P. V is sitting fourth to the right of S. Only one person is sitting in the immediate left of Q. Who among the following are sitting at the extreme ends?

In a family there are eight members. J and L are sisters of K. L has a son M who is married to U. J has a daughter Y who is married to W. J and L have only one child each. M is brother-in-law of T. How is K related to M?
What is the bigger angle between both the hands when it is 30 minutes past 7?

Point B is 3m North of point A. Point C is 3m West of point B. Point D is 5m South of point C. Point E is 7m East of point D. In which of the following directions is point E, with reference to point B?
If ‘p’ means ‘-’, ‘q’ means ‘+’, ‘r’ means ‘÷’ and ‘s’ means ‘×’, then 18 p 6 q 4 s 6 r 2 =?
In a certain code, EDUCATION is written as DUETACNIO. How is KNOWLEDGE written in that code language?
In a code language, ‘FASHION’ is coded as ‘FAIHIED’, then how will ‘FAMOUS’ be coded in the same code language?
Direction (1-3): In the following question, select the related word from the given alternatives. PRAG: QTDK:: STOP:?
Select the option that is related to the fifth letter cluster in the same way as the second letter cluster is related to the first... PORTRAY: YARTROP CONCEPT: TPECNOC:: REGULAR:?
In a certain code language, if NATURE is coded as 'ERUTAN' and CIRCLE is coded as 'ELCRIC', then what will DANGER be coded as?
Select the jumbled word which is different from the three other alternatives.
Rearrange the jumbled letters to make a meaningful word and then select the one which is different. NADINI... SUSRAIN... FRIANCA... NYUPODT
In the question given find the odd word from the given alternatives. 1. Nephrology 2. Astrology 3. Ornithology 4. Entomology
Identify the term that does not fit into the group - 1. Kalahari 2. Sahara 3. Gobi 4. Sunderban
Find the next number in the following series: 38, 40, 83, 253, 1017, ?
In the following sequences some letters are missing which are given in that order as one other alternatives under it. Find the correct alternative in question. P_QPP_QPQ_PPQ_P

If the first half of the English alphabet series is reversed and remaining half alphabets are kept in original order, which letter would be the seventh letter to the left of the tenth letter from the right end?
In the following question, select the related word from the given alternatives. Impartial : Unbiased :: Apathetic : ?
Select the related letters from the given alternatives. ACFJ : DFIM :: GILP : ?
From amongst the figures marked (A), (B), (C) and (D), select the figure which satisfies the same conditions of placement of dots as in figure (X).
From amongst the figures marked (A), (B), (C) and (D), select the figure which satisfies the same conditions of placement of dots as in figure (X).
If a mirror is placed on the line AB, then which of the answer figures is the right image of the given figure?
Select the option figure in which the given figure (X) is embedded as its part (rotation is NOT allowed).
Which one of the following diagrams correctly depicts brinjal, food, vegetable?

Two statements are given followed by two conclusions numbered I and II. Statements: 1) All games are tournaments. 2) Some tournaments are matches. Conclusions: I. All games are matches. II. No game is a tournament.

choices.text: Neither Conclusion I nor II follows.
Both Conclusions I and II follow.
